rationale.fidelity: Explicitly diagnoses the objective substitution and repairs it to advertising revenue net of direct moderation cost while retaining the common threshold mechanism and uncertainty.
rationale.managerial_framing: The repaired actor, trigger, choice, inputs, stakes, mechanism, trade-off, and threshold counterfactual are all concrete.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No novelty is claimed, and the response correctly bounds scholarly conclusions in the absence of literature and results.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Clearly marks welfare, safety, fairness, and community-health claims as unsupported extensions and calls for operational input validation.
rationale.prose_clarity: Clear and disciplined, though slightly longer than necessary and affected by minor encoding artifacts.
rationale.overall: An exemplary diagnosis and repair of the objective mismatch; references to failed gates describe the proposed narrative, not an error in the response, so no hard failure applies.
